title: Meta to invest $10bn in Texas AI data center

title: Meta, Nvidia, Roblox sued by 3D artist over AI training
description: Meta Platforms , Nvidia and Roblox were hit with proposed class action lawsuits in California federal court on Thursday by a ​digital artist who alleged that the companies misused millions of ‌3D models to train generative artificial intelligence systems.

title: Bots full of flattery, bad advice
description: Artificial intelligence chatbots are so prone to flattering and validating their human users that they are giving bad advice that can damage relationships and reinforce harmful behaviors, according to a new study that explores the dangers of AI telling people what they want to hear.

description: Chinese artificial intelligence powerhouse and TikTok creator ByteDance has quietly rolled out its latest video generator SeeDance 2.0 worldwide, while its U.S. rival OpenAI called time on a similar product. title: Sen. Jim Banks Warns U.S. Must Win AI Race Against China to Prevent Global Domination
description: Sen. Jim Banks cautions tthe U.S. must lead in artificial intelligence or risk China dominating globally, emphasizing national strength.
content:

title: Generative AI for polymer design passes lab tests with a new dielectric material
description: The words on this page mean something because they are assembled in a particular order and follow the complex rules of grammar and syntax. Creating new chemical polymers follows a similar kind of structure, with rules about what elements and groups of atoms go together and how to assemble them to make sense. Thinking about polymers in that way has led Georgia Tech materials scientists to create new generative artificial intelligence tools that are like Claude or ChatGPT for new materials.

title: US stocks: Apple plans to open Siri to rival AI services, Bloomberg News reports
description: Apple is set to open its Siri voice assistant to other artificial intelligence services. This move will allow users to connect with AI platforms like Alphabet's Gemini and Anthropic's Claude directly through Siri. The change aims to boost Apple's AI capabilities and position the iPhone as a versatile AI hub.
